source_quote: Verified abstinent rates were 45.5% in warm handoff versus 14.3% in fax referral at 6 months (not significant).
7-day PPA rates reached 8% versus 11% at 6 months for Aurora and ESC, respectively. Logistic regression Model A: Intervention OR 0.88 (LCL 0.40, UCL 1.97), p = .762
24-hr quit attempts at 6 months: At least one - Aurora 76 (49%) vs ESC 83 (56%), p = .803
This paper (PMC4676308) reports on secukinumab (anti-IL-17A) versus placebo in psoriasis. It does not contain any comparison of fumaric acid esters versus methotrexate.
